ESSENCE OF TESTING

Anand Bagmar

Senior Quality Engineering Leadership

Quality Executive  ·  Strategist  ·  Software Quality Evangelist  ·  25+ Years

Open to FTE  ·  Fractional  ·  Consulting & Advisory
Get in Touch View Profile Case Studies

"Strategic where it matters, practical where it counts - helping organisations turn quality into a durable business advantage, whether as a leader, a consultant, or both."

25+ Years' Experience
15+ Global Clients
100s Professionals Trained
3 Open-Source Tools
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Quality Executive  ·  Strategist  ·  Automation Expert

Anand Bagmar is a software quality executive, keynote speaker, and test automation expert with over 25 years of experience leading quality strategy and transformation across complex technology environments. He is open to senior quality engineering leadership roles - FTE or fractional/interim - as well as consulting and advisory engagements.

His work spans quality assessments, roadmap definition, automation strategy, and hands-on implementation across telecom, e-commerce, gaming, SaaS, enterprise platforms, and banking/financial services. A Selenium and Appium contributor and creator of open-source tools used globally - and a regular conference speaker on software quality and AI-driven test automation.

Domains: Telecom  ·  E-Commerce  ·  Gaming  ·  SaaS  ·  Banking & Financial Services  ·  Enterprise Platforms
25+Years of QA Excellence
15+Global Organisations
100sProfessionals Trained
3Open-Source Tools
CORE EXPERTISE

Six pillars of measurable impact

01

Quality Leadership & Strategy

Quality operating models, governance frameworks, and risk-based practices that align quality with business outcomes and delivery confidence.

Learn more →
02

Test Automation & AI Quality

AI-driven scalable automation for web, mobile, API, desktop, and visual testing - improving reliability across CI/CD pipelines.

Learn more →
03

Transformation & Advisory

Quality assessments, roadmaps, and contextual implementation - equally effective in short advisory engagements and full transformation programmes.

Learn more →
04

Training & Enablement

Workshops, bootcamps, and enterprise programmes - training hundreds of professionals on modern automation and AI adoption.

Learn more →
05

Framework & Tool Innovation

Creator of Teswiz, WAAT, and TTA - open-source tools adopted and trusted by the global testing community.

Learn more →
06

Cross-Functional Improvement

Works across product, engineering, and leadership teams to reduce friction and build scalable, sustainable QA and SDET capability.

Learn more →
OFFERINGS

How Essence of Testing creates value

01

Strategic Consulting

Practical, fit-for-purpose solutions leveraging AI and industry best practices - tailored to your product, team, and business goals.

02

AI-Powered Solutions

Adopt innovative AI tools to streamline testing, accelerate automation, reduce flakiness, and improve overall reliability.

03

Team Upskilling

Transform manual testers to automation-ready contributors. Deliver better ROI from your automation investment through structured programmes.

04

QA Community Engagement

Stay ahead with the latest practices, tools, and thought leadership - connecting with the global quality engineering community.

CLIENTS & ORGANISATIONS

Trusted by global leaders across industries

CASE STUDIES

Real engagements. Measurable outcomes.

Telecom · eComm · Media 4.5 Years · 75+ SDETs

Reliance Jio: Transforming Quality Engineering at Scale

Assessment, strategy, and full implementation across 20+ product teams - automation frameworks, AI visual testing, and a Quality Engineering Competency Centre.

Read case study →
Gaming 5 Weeks · 50 SDETs

Upskilling 50 SDETs with AI-Powered Test Automation

Intensive classroom programme that transitioned manual testers to automation-ready contributors - with AI-assisted automation, daily evaluations, and final projects.

Read case study →
